title: nepeta amicorum
intro: Nepeta amicorum, also known as 'Friend to Cats' or 'Fragrant Friendship', is a hybrid perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), created by crossing Nepeta faassenii with Nepeta racemosa. The plant's leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, which have been used to create herbal preparations for various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Nepeta amicorum include its ability to ease stress and anxiety, promote restful sleep, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Nepeta amicorum can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
